Your <tool_call> block contained invalid JSON.

Expected structure:

<tool_call>
{
  "tool_id": "T1",
  "name": "TOOL_NAME_HERE",
  "arguments": {
    "arg1": "...",
    "arg2": "...",
    "...": "..."
  }
}
</tool_call>

- The outer object MUST contain "arguments" (object) and at least one of:
  - "tool_id" (string), or
  - "name" (string).

This is attempt {current_attempt} of {max_call_errors}.
In your next assistant response, send a valid <tool_call> block with correctly formatted JSON.
